title: Bahrain partners with SandboxAQ to build quantum-safe economy
description: Bahrain News Agency (official state news agency). Reports the National Cyber Security Center (NCSC) of the Kingdom of Bahrain partnership with SandboxAQ to transition the government toward a quantum-safe economy / post-quantum era across ~60 ministries. December 2025.

title: Bahrain on the verge of a cybersecurity quantum leap - NCSC Chief
description: Bahrain News Agency item quoting the NCSC Chief on a cybersecurity 'quantum leap'. 'Quantum leap' appears metaphorical (general cybersecurity progress); no confirmed explicit post-quantum-cryptography/quantum-safe-cryptography reference in available text. Borderline.

title: National Cyber Security Center strategic partnership with SandboxAQ (media center)
description: NCSC Bahrain media center carrying the SandboxAQ quantum-safe partnership announcement. URL is a JS-driven template (not a clean per-article canonical URL); same event as the BNA item. Issuer is NCSC (domestic government agency).

title: Bahrain National Cyber Security Strategy 2025-2028
description: NCSC Bahrain national cyber security strategy (five pillars). General cyber strategy; no explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography mention confirmed in available text.

title: National Cyber Security Strategy 2025-2028 (summary PDF)
description: NCSC Bahrain summary of the 2025-2028 national cyber security strategy. General strategy; no explicit PQC/quantum-safe cryptography reference confirmed.

title: CNI Cybersecurity Controls
description: NCSC Bahrain critical national infrastructure cybersecurity controls. General cryptographic/security controls; no explicit post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography reference confirmed.

title: Bahrain Government Partners with SandboxAQ to Build a Quantum-Safe Economy (vendor press release)
description: SandboxAQ (vendor) press release on the Bahrain quantum-safe / post-quantum partnership. Explicit PQC but issuer is a foreign vendor, not a domestic institution. Excluded by issuer rule.
